code-high-dialogue-core-w5a.subject: Implement core DialogueOrchestrator class
code-high-dialogue-core-w5a.description: Phase 1.1-1.2: Create src/strategies/dialogue.py with DialogueOrchestrator class, DialogueRound, DialogueHistory dataclasses. Add requires_requery property to base CollaborationStrategy. Core multi-round dialogue with cost tracking and budget enforcement.

code-high-dialogue-integrate-w5b.subject: Integrate DialogueOrchestrator with executors
code-high-dialogue-integrate-w5b.description: Phase 1.3-1.4: Add _run_dialogue_synthesis() and _reinvoke_agents_with_dialogue() to both parallel.py and sequential.py executors. Implement dialogue history propagation and agent re-invocation.

code-high-dialogue-config-w5c.subject: Add dialogue configuration schema and registry
code-high-dialogue-config-w5c.description: Phase 1.5-1.6: Extend CollaborationConfig in schemas.py with dialogue fields (max_dialogue_rounds, round_budget_usd, dialogue_mode). Register DialogueOrchestrator in strategy registry.

test-high-dialogue-phase1.subject: Test Phase 1 dialogue implementation
test-high-dialogue-phase1.description: Comprehensive testing: agent re-invocation, dialogue history, cost budget, max_rounds, backward compatibility. Integration tests for both executors.

test-quick-dialogue-suite.subject: Create comprehensive test suite for DialogueOrchestrator
test-quick-dialogue-suite.description: Create tests/test_strategies/test_dialogue.py with unit tests, integration tests, and edge cases. Target: 300-400 lines, >80% coverage.

test-quick-dialogue-validation.subject: Create end-to-end validation script
test-quick-dialogue-validation.description: Create examples/validate_dialogue_orchestrator.py to validate dialogue works end-to-end. Target: 150-200 lines.

docs-quick-dialogue-guide.subject: Write user documentation
docs-quick-dialogue-guide.description: Create docs/collaboration_strategies.md user guide and update ARCHITECTURE_ISSUES_BACKLOG.md to mark Issue #20 complete.

code-med-semantic-convergence.subject: Implement semantic convergence detection for DialogueOrchestrator
code-med-semantic-convergence.description: Add semantic similarity comparison using embeddings instead of exact string matching. Use sentence-transformers to detect when agents express the same idea differently. Fallback to exact match if embeddings unavailable.

code-med-role-dialogue.subject: Implement role-based dialogue system
code-med-role-dialogue.description: Add agent role system (proposer, critic, synthesizer, reviewer) for structured dialogue. Modify agent re-invocation to pass role context. Update prompt templates with role-specific instructions.

code-med-context-curation.subject: Implement context curation for dialogue history
code-med-context-curation.description: Add selective history propagation based on relevance. Support context strategies: full, recent, relevant. Implement filtering in agent re-invocation.

code-med-merit-weighted.subject: Implement merit-weighted dialogue synthesis
code-med-merit-weighted.description: Use AgentMeritScore to weight agent opinions in final synthesis. Query merit scores from observability tracker. High-merit agents weighted more heavily. Fallback to equal weighting if scores unavailable.
